system.damage: toothy maw d10+3 w/advantage (_close_, _grabby_, _messy_, 1 piercing) or raking claws d10+1 (_hand_, _messy_, 1 piercing)
system.specialQuality: chained to a heavy block of makerglass, takes +1d6 damage from bronze, soothed by a well-sung song
system.moves:
- Scent blood, anywhere in the lake
- Shoot through the water
- Snatch prey, pull it under
- Regenerate any wound not dealt by bronze
- Drag its mooring across the lakebed, slowly and painfully

It was a gift from the Things Below, a pres- ent to some Barrow Builder tyrant. They bound it fast and kept in the waters nearby, feeding it a steady of diet of screaming, bleeding victims. It’s still out there, sleep- ing for years or decades at a time, roused by copious amounts of fresh blood in the lake—or by a few drops somewhere nearby.
